_note: One-off recording for u1 sources Extension #3 (FD L6.7). Tests must NOT re-fetch — they replay this body via httpx.MockTransport. Re-record only when the live feed structure changes; document the change in aidlc-docs/audit.md. Yonhap 마켓+ feed is RSS 2.0; <pubDate> is RFC 822 with +0900 (KST) offset; titles and descriptions are CDATA-wrapped Korean text (UTF-8); every item in this recording carries a <dc:creator> element under the dc namespace (http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/), but per FD L6.7 the adapter MUST treat <dc:creator> as optional and OMIT the raw_metadata.creator key when absent (not emit empty string). The feed also declares xmlns:content / xmlns:media / xmlns:atom / xmlns:sy at the rss root and emits <media:content> children inside items; the adapter ignores all namespaced child elements (per the same approach used by L6.6 / L6.9). Recorder UA 'investo-fixture-recorder@example.com' is for fixture-provenance audit only — the production adapter sends NO custom UA (R14 does NOT apply to this source).
